name: gatk.LearnReadOrientationModel
description: Learns read orientation artifact priors from F1R2 counts produced by Mutect2 or CollectF1R2Counts. Uses an Expectation-Maximization algorithm to model orientation-dependent sequencing artifacts (e.g., OxoG damage) at each trinucleotide context. The output artifact-prior tar.gz is used by FilterMutectCalls to filter orientation bias artifacts.

name: gatk.SelectVariants
description: Selects a subset of variants from a VCF file based on criteria such as variant type (SNP, INDEL), sample identity, JEXL filter expressions, and filtering status. Produces a new VCF containing only the variants that meet the selection criteria. Part of the GATK4 variant filtering toolkit.
